mapper.select: SELECT thi.hr_id FROM esg.tb_hr_info thi WHERE thi.jbrp = '202501010001' LIMIT 1
SELECT thi.hr_nm FROM esg.tb_hr_info thi WHERE thi.jbrp = '00001' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_hse_policy_suggestion WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_hse_policy_suggestion ( doc_seq, write_year, doc_type, doc_no, hr_id, worker_suggestion, use_yn, created_at, created_by, comp_id ) VALUES ( #{docSeq}, #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, ( SELECT hr_id FROM esg.tb_hr_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} ), #{workerSuggestion}, #{useYn}, now(), #{userId}, #{compId} )
mapper.select: select t1.write_year , t1.doc_type , t1.doc_no , t1.comp_id , t1.data_type from esg.tb_hse_policy t1 where t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.confirm_yn = 'Y' and t1.use_yn = 'Y'
